metadata.title: Waggle — Your AI Agent Workspace
metadata.description: Desktop AI agent workspace with persistent memory, 53+ tools, and zero cloud dependency. Free for individuals.
metadata.og_description: A workspace where AI agents remember your context, connect to your tools, and improve with every interaction. Desktop-native. Privacy-first.
metadata.twitter_description: Desktop AI agent workspace with persistent memory, 53+ tools, and zero cloud dependency.

variant_a.subhead: Persistent memory across every LLM you use. Claude, GPT, Qwen, Gemini, your local model — all drawing from the same locally-stored knowledge graph.
variant_a.body: Stop the paste-context-fatigue cycle. Your context lives once, persists across models, and compounds with every session you finish.

variant_b.headline_lead: AI workspace that satisfies your CISO.
variant_b.subhead: Local-first by default, EU AI Act audit reports built into the workflow, backed by Egzakta Group's regulated-industries practice.
variant_b.body: Your CISO blocked ChatGPT for good reasons. Waggle keeps the work on your machine and generates Article 12 audit reports automatically — no separate compliance workstream.

variant_c.headline_lead: Your team's memory, before someone has to write it down.
variant_c.subhead: Notion wikis go stale. Slack search is hostile. Waggle captures the context as you work — no extra step.
variant_c.body: Onboarding an 8-person team gets shorter when context auto-organizes from work activity, not from someone remembering to write the wiki page.

variant_d.headline_lead: Memory layer that doesn't lock you to a vendor.
variant_d.subhead: Apache 2.0, MCP-native, runs locally. The substrate plugs into whatever agent harness you're already running.
variant_d.body: Mem0 is cloud-only. LangMem is toy-tier. Letta is agent-centric. Waggle is the substrate — fork the source, audit the graph, deploy on your infra.

variant_e.headline_lead: AI that never sees your client matter.
variant_e.subhead: Local-first by design, bar association compatible, full audit log per matter — work stays on your machine.
variant_e.body: ChatGPT-as-malpractice-risk has stalled adoption in legal. Waggle's hive lives on the device; every recall carries provenance, every matter has a trail.

hero.microcopy: 17 AI platforms · Local-first · Apache 2.0 · EU AI Act ready

hero_visual.svg_aria_label: Hive memory connecting four LLM providers

proof.headline: Numbers that survive peer review.
proof.subhead: Five proof points. Trio-strict judge ensemble (Opus + GPT + MiniMax). Frozen seeds, published manifests. The methodology is in the arxiv preprint.

how_it_works.headline: Three steps. No new habits.
how_it_works.subhead: Waggle stays out of the way. You install it once, keep using the AI you already use, and your context starts compounding.

step_01.title: Install once
step_01.body: Download the desktop app, choose your LLM provider — local, frontier, or both. Waggle starts capturing the moment you begin working.

step_02.title: Work normally
step_02.body: Use any AI like before. Switch models mid-thread. The memory persists across providers, sessions, and machines, automatically.

step_03.title: Compound, don't repeat
step_03.body: Every conversation builds your knowledge graph. The next prompt starts where the last one left off. You never paste the same context twice.

personas_section.heading: Thirteen ways people work. One memory layer.
personas_section.subtitle: Hunters chase, builders ship, orchestrators coordinate. Waggle remembers — across roles, across tools, across the moments in between.

pricing.headline: Free for individuals. Honest pricing for everyone else.
pricing.subhead: Three tiers. No feature-count games. You pay for the scale of the team using the memory, not for arbitrary check-marks.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: For power users compounding across projects

teams.tagline: For teams that want shared memory without losing privacy
teams.audience: Small teams (3–50 seats) in regulated industries

trust.headline: Built and backed by Egzakta Group, advising regulated industries in DACH, CEE, and the UK since 2010.
trust.subhead: Not a venture-funded startup pivoting through positioning cycles. An advisory practice that has shipped to banks, insurers, and law firms for 16 years.

signals.eu_ai_act: EU AI Act compliant — Article 12 audit reports

final_cta.headline: Stop pasting context. Start using AI that remembers.
final_cta.subhead: Free for individuals. Pro for power users. Teams for organizations. KVARK for sovereign deployments.
final_cta.kvark_text: Need it on your organization's sovereign infrastructure?
